nodes.label: MMKV Sync Queue for Offline Mutations
nodes.norm_label: mmkv sync queue for offline mutations

nodes.label: Token-Driven Design System
nodes.rationale: All visual layout properties derive from theme.ts constants to avoid arbitrary magic pixel sizes and hardcoded hex values, enforcing the anti-hex rule from 03-ui-styling.md. 4px base spacing increment and 7 authorized typography styles enforce consistency.

nodes.label: Anti-Unmount Session Guard
nodes.rationale: Session state NEVER cleared on component unmount or nav blur — only on explicit finishSession or discardSession calls. MMKV persistence ensures workout data survives OS force-close.

nodes.label: TypeScript Path Aliases
nodes.rationale: @/* mapped to ./src/* to enforce absolute import paths across the codebase, banning relative multi-step lookups (../../components) per 04-expo-routing.md rules.

nodes.label: MMKV-Backed Auth Storage Pattern
nodes.rationale: Supabase auth sessions stored via MMKV instead of AsyncStorage so that sessions survive app restarts. Custom storage adapter passed to createClient auth config.
